div.p: [Vue 3 / Vite / Nuxt UI / Reka UI] Dashboard for inventory, alerts, integration health, recommendations, and compliance evidence.
[AdonisJS / REST / OpenAPI] Authenticated entry point for users, partners, and internal APIs.
[AdonisJS / Lucid ORM / PostgreSQL] Medication, lot, expiration, location, and movement system of record.
[Workers / ETL] Validates, maps, deduplicates, quarantines, and normalizes partner payloads.
[TypeScript worker / rules engine] Rules-based shortage, overstock, expiry risk, and replenishment signals.
[AdonisJS service module] Evidence capture, policy findings, trace IDs, and review packages.
